faqs.question: What is Central Tribal University Andhra Pradesh CUET cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer:

Tabulated below are the course-wise Last Round closing scores based on CUET for the General All India candidates for CTUAP cutoff 2023:

faqs.question: What are the factors determining Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh Cutoff 2023 cutoff?
faqs.answer:
A. There are various key factors that play an important role in deciding the Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh Cutoff 2023 cut off marks. Following are the determining factors that are considered while releasing the Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh Cutoff 2023, including:
Previous year CUET cutoff marks
Total number of participants for CUET exam 
Total number of seats available in the university 
The difficulty level of CUET entrance exam

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Geology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good university with excellent faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In our course, as it is a science course, i.e., geology, we didn't have many placements. Out of the three people in our seniors, two people got placements. Like our university didn't give it, but they have recommended to the institution that these two people can work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Regarding our infrastructure for our quote, it is good as we have the minimum requirement for our course. It is a government university, and it is still in the construction process, so we do not have our permanent hostel yet. Currently, we are in a transit campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. + M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our university has poor facilities, but it provides better exposure to learning something in life.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing my 2nd year (4th semester) of B.Sc. Chemistry (Honours/with Research). This is the first batch in our university, as it was established in 2019, and my course, B.Sc. Chemistry (Honours/with Research), started in 2023. It is the first batch there are no other batches, which affects placement. But our university also has an M.Sc. Chemistry students, and some of them are placed in various pharmaceutical companies like Eisai, Divis, Hetero, Dr. Reddy's, etc. The salary packages in these companies range from a minimum of Rs. 25,000 to a maximum of Rs. 28,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: There were nine seniors in our batch, and one of those students had taken a job that pays only 5 lacs per annum. Some of the students have gone to the Central University of Andhra Pradesh to pursue their M.Sc. in artificial intelligence. So, you can't keep placements as an option when you come here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities, which are very good, but we don't have hostels in our own college. So, we have to reside in paid guest hostels in the city or in private college hostels, which are shown by the university. The cost is in the 3400 to 5400 range.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Sc. M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I feel very satisfied because of this University.

review_content.Placements: Our batch is the first batch for that course in CTUAP. For our group we don't have placements but I feel that Botany course is not meant for placements but we gained lots of knowledge to crack CSIR NET Life Sciences. But we have internship opportunities from various government and non government organisations.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although there is no proper campus for our we are staying at some private hostels which are in contact basis with our university. The labs are good as they have rare equipments which are very costly. The labs are filled with air conditioned and lab equipment is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Sc. M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The University is too good.

review_content.Placements: My University provides based on our skills and job requirements and placements helps the students to development while meeting the organisation. The students got internships in research centres and well practices certificates and the and providing top recruitment companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities in our college like laboratories, skill development centers, smart classrooms and providing free Wi-Fi. The University provides all purpose of extra activities with valuable certificates. And conducted lot seminars in all languages and subjects.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. + M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Friendly faculty and peaceful environment.

review_content.Placements: As our university has recently opened, there has been no word of placements. In the next few years, there might be good opportunities. The details of the top companies, packages, and roles offered in our course are not known yet. In future years, there are good chances.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our University is a transit campus and has a calm and clean environment with friendly and supportive staff. Our campus has free wifi and spacious classrooms. Our campus has advanced lab equipment and a library with RFID technology. There is no hostel facility yet.

hostel_campus.college_name: Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university with excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Regarding our infrastructure for our quote, it is good as we have the minimum requirement for our course. It is a government university, and it is still in the construction process, so we do not have our permanent hostel yet. Currently, we are in a transit campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our university has poor facilities, but it provides better exposure to learning something in life.
reviews.review_text: Our university does not have a permanent campus right now because it is currently under construction. Currently, our classes are being held at the temporary campus of Andhra University PG campus near Kondakarakam, Vizianagaram. Our temporary campus has Wi-Fi, a good digital library, temporary labs, good faculty, and digital classrooms. The university does not provide any hostels but recommends some private hostels, such as Sitam, SVR, and Sunita, near the university.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities, which are very good, but we don't have hostels in our own college. So, we have to reside in paid guest hostels in the city or in private college hostels, which are shown by the university. The cost is in the 3400 to 5400 range.

reviews.review_heading: I feel very satisfied because of this University.
reviews.review_text: Although there is no proper campus for our we are staying at some private hostels which are in contact basis with our university. The labs are good as they have rare equipments which are very costly. The labs are filled with air conditioned and lab equipment is also there.

reviews.review_heading: The University is too good.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our college like laboratories, skill development centers, smart classrooms and providing free Wi-Fi. The University provides all purpose of extra activities with valuable certificates. And conducted lot seminars in all languages and subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly faculty and peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: Our University is a transit campus and has a calm and clean environment with friendly and supportive staff. Our campus has free wifi and spacious classrooms. Our campus has advanced lab equipment and a library with RFID technology. There is no hostel facility yet.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the hostel and placements, and satisfied because of my faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our university is still developing, but we have some lab equipment and better infrastructure. As science background students, we need better lab exposure and experience. When it comes to the hostel, our university doesn't have one, and I am staying in a private PG.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are just average. There is no special equipment available in our lab, and the classrooms are also very decent. The Wi-Fi system is quite good and available for the students. As of now, we haven't got any hostel, canteen, or medical facilities from the college because it's a temporary campus for now, and soon we will shift to our permanent campus.

college_info.college_name: J.S. University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: J.S. University is an university located in Firozabad, Uttar Pradesh. J.S. University courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. The institute is approved by PCI and AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. J.S. University offers a total of 15 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 10th Diploma and M.Pharma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 654. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Information Technology. Apart from this, the J.S. University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of J. S. University.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. Almost 50% of students got placed in our college. The average salary package is 8 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. I recommend joining this college if you want to pursue engineering or any Diploma.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are equipped with air-conditions. The food served in the mess is average. They provide medical facilities.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are good, friendly, and helpful. The teaching quality is good. If you want to get admitted to this college, you must attempt the entrance exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has a decent learning experience with room for improvement.

review_content.Placements: JS University's placements record is decent, and 70-80 percent of students get placed. Top recruiting companies for our course are Maruti Suzuki Kia Motors and Mitsubishi. The highest package offered is around 7 LPA. The average package is around 3 LPA. Placement opportunities are better for students with technical skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for courses is good. It has well equipped labs and classrooms. The library has a vast collection of books and journals with online resources too. Hostel facilities are decent. It has clean rooms and basic amenities. Mess food is average with limited options for students and dietary restrictions. WiFi connectivity is available but speed can be slow at times.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Fully satisfied because faculty is good .

review_content.Placements: The percent of students in my course were placed around 60% and the highest package was 7 LPA and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Now, let come to the Top recruiting companies HCL, TCS and Infosys. Percentage of students who got internship are around 40%. The college does not provide any internship programme.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is Good? , I would like to rate 4 out of 5. Faculty members are good, they are helpful. I am Day scholar so, I don't know about hostel facilities and quality of mess. But I heard from my friend who live in hostel and he reviewed about hostel facilities is okay (not so good and not so poor).

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and I would rate it 8 stars out of 10. All facilities are excellent. Sports are conducted on our campus. If you are looking for the best quality of living sense, it is a good option. Many libraries are available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for management and administration deals.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. All classrooms and labs were the best for studying purposes.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities were provided in our college like computer labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library. Hostel served good food. Sports facilities were provided. Canteen was clean and hygienic. Medical facility was available.

reviews.review_heading: There is really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Regular classes are held in the campus. Good infrastructure and all the facilities are available. There are labs for all the courses and large no. of books are present in the library. The rooms in hostel are designed in a way that they are comfortable to study. The food quality is very good. Regular competitions are held related to games and many activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with fees and passing percentage.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The courses are so good in the department. Wi-Fi is available here and the classroom is always kept neat and clean. The library facility is available. In my hostel, all facilities are available and in the mess, not all food is good. You can take canteen food instead. Medical facilities are available and all sports facilities are not provided. There are only a few games available with good playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are average in our college.
reviews.review_text: JS has hostel facilities. The college has great classrooms and a computer lab with Wi-Fi facilities. Canteen and library facilities are available. The library has a good collection of books, and daily newspapers like Hindu, Amar Ujwala, Dainik, etc. The college has its own labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good because of teachers and my friends.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in a maximum area, but sometimes some areas seem to have no connection. Infrastructure is good as of now and I hope they will continue to update that infrastructure. Sports complexes are normal. You can enjoy them, but your hope of being a professional is not good.

reviews.review_heading: For the education, our university is very bad. Teachers do not teach well.
reviews.review_text: This college is spread over a large area. It has a Wi-Fi facility all over the campus, but the speed is very slow. The classrooms have good furniture and a projector but are not air-conditioned. There are different labs dedicated to practicals. It also provides sports facilities like a football ground, volleyball ground, and a running track.

review_summary.college_name: Yenepoya University Bangalore Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Cloud Computing in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is not good, but the lecturers are friendly and good at teaching.

content.Placements: Actually, we are the first batch of the Yenepoya Bangalore campus, and according to them, we will get good placements in top companies like IBM and TCS, which are already integrated with our course. A lot of events and hackathons have already been conducted by them, so we have good hope in that.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is frankly very poor. When I visit for the first time, it is in a big 10 or 15-floor building with a lot of space around it, but the college occupies only 3 floors. The outside area is not completely under Yenepoya.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with minor in Robotics in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A standard college for studying with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Actually, I am a student from the first batch of this college. The first batch of the Bangalore campus is now in the 4th semester. So, the placements have not yet started on our campus. However, the Bangalore campus of the same college is providing a standard placement percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well.
content.Faculty: Most faculty members are very well and friendly. Like in every college, there are some faculty members who are rude, and some are not much well, but when compared to many other colleges, faculty members are very helpful and friendly. The exams are not very difficult, and we can clear them easily if we try to study something. The courses are designed properly. They include only the needed things. The syllabus is well-structured, and even a below-average student will be able to understand the concepts easily.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Better exposure for learning.

content.Placements: I am the first batch in Yenepoya Bangalore campus, I will only get to know about the placements only after the 5th semester. But to be fair during my 4th semester now the college is conducting mock interviews and more practical activities to help children achieve their goals and get placed in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: We are getting a top-notch infrastructure but the case is not feasible if you are looking for a campus life, as a student of this college. I am totally happy with the limited campus experience because of my personal choices. For your information, hostel facility is not provided by the college but easy availability of PG's are available near the locality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very happy to get admission in this college.

content.Placements: I really don't know about the placement because the college started around 2 years ago in Bangalore, so we do not know about the placement in the college. If we want campus placement, we need above 80% in all the semesters. Placement is decided based on our skills, communication skills, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus, so we can't experience campus life. But, the infrastructure is very good with smart class, full-time AC, Wi-Fi, library, all there. I am staying at a PG, so I don't know about the hostel. Facilities and infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence, Robotics and Internet of Things in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College review based on personal experience.

content.Placements: We are the first batch of Yenepoya Bangalore so as of now I can't provide details about the placements. I know that our college is providing placements for students who are interested. The average package they are providing is around 6 LPA. Companies like IBM TCS Microsoft etc. are offering placement opportunities, as our college has collaborations with these companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is pretty good but the hostel is very bad. They don’t provide WiFi for students but the campus has WiFi connections. We have a computer lab with a capacity of 120 seats and classrooms also have a capacity of 120 students. The library has very useful books. The quality of the hostel is bad, as they don’t provide enough quality and quantity of food. They charge 1.3 LPA, but it isn’t worth it, and the room is too small for four people. The college has stopped providing hostel facilities due to many problems.

paragraphs: Yenepoya University, Bangalore Campus admission process includes registration, merit list and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in Yenepoya University, Bangalore Campus:
STEP 1: Yenepoya University, Bangalore Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university. Candidates need to pay an application fee to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Yenepoya University, Bangalore, shortlists candidates based on the Y-entrance exam. Students who are looking for course admission should meet the last educational qualification set by the institute.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the university. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

While applying for the scholarship, candidates need to keep a few details handy, such as Class 10 and 12 percentages. Students need to keep their scholarship reference ID handy which will be provided by the admission counsellor.

paragraphs: Mind Power University admission for the season 2025 isongoingfor all UG, PG and diploma courses. Admission to the university ismerit-based.Mind Power Universityoffers various courses in the fields of Engineering, Science, Management, Commerce, and others. The university courses include BTech, BCom, MTech, MA, etc. Candidates interested in applying for any courses are required to apply online by visiting the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about the Mind Power University admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection and admission process:

Admission to all the courses offered by Mind Power University is subject to the merit of the last qualifying exam. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria set by the university for admission. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for Mind Power University course admission 2025:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 in science or equivalent from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 with Science and Mathematics from a recognised board
Merit-Based
BSc/BSc (Hons.) or equivalent with Physics as a regular subject
Merit-Based
B.E./ BTech in relevant field with 50% aggregate
Merit-Based
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreMind Power University courses
Steps for Mind Power UniversityAdmission Process2025
Mind Power University admissionprocessstarts with filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Mind Power University2025:
STEP 1: Mind Power UniversityApplication Process 2025

Candidates looking for admission to any course are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for admission. After filling out the criteria candidates are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the university.
STEP 2: Mind Power University Selection Round
Mind Power Universityselects candidates for some UG, PG and diploma courses based on the last qualifying entrance exam score.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the requiredMind Power Universityfeewithin the given deadline to secure their seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is an extremely beautiful and good college.

review_content.Placements: 86% of students got internships. The top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Wipro, and Microsoft. The highest salary package is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 3 LPA. The top roles offered are web developer and software developer. Around 70% of students got internships in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls. There are bedrooms with attached bathrooms. The hotel food is good, with homemade food. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are also good. The library is available in the college. It is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very nice college and you will get very good faculty members and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Marine engineering is one of the best courses compared to others, and in Karnataka, there is only one BE marine engineering college, which is Srinivas Institute of Technology Mangaluru. In this course, you can earn more money than in other courses, but all you need to do is work hard.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, they conduct labs based on the machines used in ships and other machinery systems. We have a very good library, and our college campus provides free Wi-Fi. The college canteen food is much better compared to outside food.

review_summary.college_name: Srinivas Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Srinivas Group of Colleges.

content.Placements: There are many opportunities in our college, and one-year internships are also offered. We can get into hospitals or industries which manufacture drugs or companies like Pharmacovigilance.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is located in a fresh green environment with a big football ground and cricket field. It also has good parking space, and three canteens are available with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. Our classrooms are huge, and it has comfortable chairs. It also provides a central library.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very friendly and well-experienced. They always help students with their doubts. Our course curriculum is easy to pass, and the passing percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: A review of Srinivas Institute Electrical and Electronics.

content.Placements: Most of the companies that come for placements are software companies. It is not a college to choose if you want to get core jobs. The college provides placement training, and you will get ample opportunities if you have 65% aggregate. The famous companies that conduct drives here are Infosys, SLK Software, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is very poor. The ground is huge but not at all well-maintained. The labs are well-equipped, and the lecture halls are good. The library has a sufficient number of books. The food available is not of good quality. The college is okay if you only consider studies, but the buildings are very old and not maintained properly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Management (B. B. M.) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The faculty and the course curriculum is good.

content.Placements: The college conducts campus placements to make the students get their dream jobs. The salary offered to the students range between Rs. 8000 to Rs. 20,000 per month based on student's performance. But most of them are not getting good packages. The college is now autonomous under Mangalore University. The companies are not selecting students; they are just visiting the campus and conducting interviews. Only a few students are being selected, that too at low salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with nice ambience. The college just has only one building. The Wi-Fi facility is available, but not for students. The lift facility is also available, but students cant use it. A late fee applies to the students who come late to the college. If you can pay fine, you can do anything in the college. They are doing business with education.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Management (B. B. M.) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of management and bad infrastructure, but the faculty are good.

content.Placements: The college provides placement opportunities, but let me tell you clearly that there will be no big companies or your dream company in that list. Do not expect and help from the management about this placement stuff as well. Overall, it is going to be a bad choice if you are looking for some great job in your future and moreover, you need to prepare everything by yourself without expecting any help from anyone.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about Wi-Fi it is better that you do not use it. I did my graduation and I do not remember that I ever used the Wi-Fi of college because it never works and moreover, you are not allowed to bring cell phones to college. Computer labs are there but none of the computers will work properly they are just for namesake. You will not be allowed to use them during the class hours so you need to wait till the class get over. The library is good for nothing as all you can find is some old books which will be of no use and lots of project work. I personally went to the principal regarding this problem and all I got was scolding and some enemies. The classrooms were not good, and there are no sports facilities (the college lacks a ground and even if you manage to find some place to play, you need to worry about the attendance), so for sports lovers, this is not a place to visit.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The Srinivas group of colleges are quite good for students for their growth.

content.Placements: The placements are quite good for computer Science and EC departments. For mechanical and civil students placements are too bad. The placement co-coordinators will help the students and they will conduct mock interviews before the students go to attend the actual interview.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was pretty good. The college is located in two different places in the outskirts of Bangalore. The college was located far away from cities which is the best thing. Overall the college infrastructure is good well suited for engineering students.

paragraphs:
Srinivas Group of Colleges course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theSrinivas Group of Collegesapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.

hostel_campus.college_name: Srinivas Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good but has high fees.
reviews.review_text: Here, all facilities are decent. The labs are decent, and Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are good. The hostel is present, but the mess food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The library and labs still need improvement. The hostels are good, but Wi-Fi is slow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but it's left to you what to choose.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there in labs and also in the hostel mess. Classrooms are also good. Hostel rooms are good, but sometimes the water is dirty. Food is just okay, only veg, no non-veg is provided. There is no lift in the hostel, so if you are staying on the 5th floor, it will be difficult to walk daily. Warden also keeps changing, new wardens come, but all are good. Cleaning is done every two days.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an extremely beautiful and good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls. There are bedrooms with attached bathrooms. The hotel food is good, with homemade food. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are also good. The library is available in the college. It is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 15 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college and you will get very good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they conduct labs based on the machines used in ships and other machinery systems. We have a very good library, and our college campus provides free Wi-Fi. The college canteen food is much better compared to outside food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 6 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I have mentioned the college infrastructure and other details above. Please summarize that.
reviews.review_text: The subject lab facilities are also good, classrooms are neat and clean, and no negative comments on that. The library will help us during exam time, which is very helpful to the students, and it is very good. Our SIT College provides good hostel facilities, which is more important for students to stay. Coming to the hostel, it is neat and clean. The food quality is not too bad in the hostel. We can get the medical facilities nearby.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good campus for students who are looking for a bright future. Placements are good.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are often good with a single chair per student. College Wi-Fi is within a limit of 100 Mbps. Computer labs are well-maintained with AC and also have a good Wi-Fi connection. Library is filled with all books related to daily life and course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 6 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculties are good at our college. Placement opportunities are average compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Library resources: The SRT library is well-equipped with a vast collection of books, general e-resources, and digital databases, providing a conducive environment for research and study crossroads at SITR designed to enhance the learning experience. Suturing modern amenities such as projectors at smart boards.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 14 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Shrinivas Institute of Technology in B.E. Computer Science and Engineering admission in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure quality in this college is very good and uses high-quality materials. The college provides many facilities like fast Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, a library, drinking water, a hostel, etc. Facilities are available. The canteen food is very neat and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 4 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience of our SIT college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well constructed. There most of the buildings are looking beautiful and attractive. All lab classes have good equipment. They're having free Wi-Fi for the requirement of students. The hostel is decent, and the food is acceptable. Medical and sports facilities were well provided at our time. I love it here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 23 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Innovation Hub: Unravelling the wonders of Srinivas Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi in the library. The labs are well-equipped. Classroom is also good, it has a projector, blackboard, and seats are arranged in a form of steps. Hostel is also good. The hostel has a spectacular view at the back. The hostel has a strict warden and security.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College is decent, placement-wise it lacks. Labs and other facilities are good on point.
reviews.review_text: Labs have decent Wi-Fi, classrooms are good. The mess is not good, sports facilities are decent. The library still needs improvement. Labs also can be improved. The hostel is not good, the mess is fine. The Wi-Fi is slow, not the fastest. They would force you to register for a certification course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 7 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placement facilities available.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are available, including Wi-Fi with unlimited access, labs with advanced equipment, and separate departments and classrooms. Hostel facilities are also good, and the food quality is acceptable. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 20 Apr 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college, 100% satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: College architecture is good; its campus and buildings are attractive. But the lecture schedule is hectic; we have back-to-back lectures without breaks. Wi-Fi, good labs, and a library are the basic facilities available at the college. The college hostel is good; we have a butterfly garden on campus. In the hostel mess, the food is average in quality and taste. The canteen's seating arrangement is good, and they offer good-quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 22 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Events and fests happen in the college. A lot of enjoyment and memories are made, and parallelly we go with proper studies and daily practice the subjects. Mess food is not bad; we adjust to the food. Transportation is easy from the campus. Games are much more played in the college house only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of CollegesReviewed on 17 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is a brand of excellence.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is better than our college surroundings and the classroom, library, and labs are also very neatly located in our college hostel. Facilities are also available in our hostel at any time. The canteen also has very good sports hours. We are enjoying a lot in our college.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 35,000 to 2,50,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs.25,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs.10,000 per month. There were no top recruiting companies in this college. Almost 10-30% of students got internships in local companies. Top roles offered were trainee and operators. Few students got placed in this college and our college management should invite many companies to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Mainly all departments were impressive. Wi-Fi was not available but laboratories were provided. It also provided a big library and the hostel was also nice. The food served in the canteen was good. All facilities were good in this college. Sports activities were also provided. Classrooms were neat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Best college only for architecture, not for B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: They bought some BPOs like zealous services and Sutherland in 2016. But now I didn't know about it. There would be no placement now, I think so. Please join some other good college any where.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure would be great. They will tell you that they got all facilities for the students. For infrastructure I will give 4 out of 5 marks. Library is good. But no Wi-Fi in college campus. Labs are so old.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are less experienced and got no knowledge. Even sometimes I think better it's right time to drop out from college. The only perfect department is B. architecture, students can prefer that course. All the other departments are the worst. Please don't join in B.Tech or B.E in this college.

review_summary.college_name: Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs.25,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs.10,000 per month. There were no top recruiting companies in this college. Almost 10-30% of students got internships in local companies. Top roles offered were trainee and operators. Few students got placed in this college and our college management should invite many companies to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Mainly all departments were impressive. Wi-Fi was not available but laboratories were provided. It also provided a big library and the hostel was also nice. The food served in the canteen was good. All facilities were good in this college. Sports activities were also provided. Classrooms were neat.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Best college only for architecture, not for B.Tech.

content.Placements: They bought some BPOs like zealous services and Sutherland in 2016. But now I didn't know about it. There would be no placement now, I think so. Please join some other good college any where.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure would be great. They will tell you that they got all facilities for the students. For infrastructure I will give 4 out of 5 marks. Library is good. But no Wi-Fi in college campus. Labs are so old.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are less experienced and got no knowledge. Even sometimes I think better it's right time to drop out from college. The only perfect department is B. architecture, students can prefer that course. All the other departments are the worst. Please don't join in B.Tech or B.E in this college.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at ICFAI Raipur are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. The Institute of Chartered Financial Analysts of India University Raipur courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at ICFAI University Chhattisgarh in the table provided below:

placements.overview: ICFAI University Raipur placement 2025 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. However, the university is conducting the placement drive for the Class of 2024. The participating recruiters offer various new-age job roles to the students of the MBA and the BTech Class of 2024 so far. The placement package recorded during ICFAI Raipur placements in 2024 was INR 6 LPA for MBA students, and INR 5 LPA for BTech students.

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University placement report 2025 has been released on the official website. Students should visit the visit the official website and click on the placement tab to view the salary package and recruiter details of 2025 and past year placements.
faqs.question: Has the ICFAI University Raipur placement report been released?

faqs.question: What are the placement packages offered at ICFAI University Raipur?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, University Raipur offers internships to MBA students. In 2024, 1 student received stipend of INR 11,000 per month, as per the annual report 2025.
faqs.question: Does ICFAI University Raipur offer internships to MBA students?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University Raipur provides good placements to its students. During the placement drive 2025, overall highest package was INR 10.5 LPA and the average package was between INR 2.6 LPA and 4.8 LPA. In 2024, overall highest and average package offered was 9 LPA and 3 LPA.
faqs.question: How are the ICFAI University Raipur placements?

faqs.answer: A:    To complete the ICFAI University, Raipur application process, students must pay the application fees. Applicants can make payment of Rs. 500 towards the cost using Credit/Debit Card (Visa/Master Card/Citibank Card).
faqs.question: What is the application fees of ICFAI Raipur?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University offers admission to most of the UG and PG courses based on merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application forms of the candidates for selection. Besides, admission to some of the courses is entrance-based. The university informs the selected candidates about the interview schedule. Shortlisted aspirants need to further pass the interview round for final selection.
faqs.question: Can I join ICFAI University Raipur directly?

faqs.answer: A:    ICFAI University Raipur eligibility criteria specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation for PG programmes. The lowest salary package offered is 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Deloitte, etc. Students who get above 75% are eligible for internships. Internships depend on students' interests.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All benches are good. Our college has air conditioners. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. Labs and the library are very helpful. The hostel is very comfortable for students. It provides food according to students' favor. The menu will be changed if students are not satisfied. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. It has an ambulance.

review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen was decent, with a clean environment, and hostel rooms were good as well. The campus is very good, it provides big ground where cricket, football, etc., were played without any problem.
review_content.Faculty: Almost all the teachers of the ICFAI University Raipur were helpful. overview_faqs.question: Is ICFAI University Raipur worth all the hype?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, ICFAI University Raipur is worth all the hype as it is recognised by UGC and has been accredited by NCTE for BEd programmes. ICFAI University Chhattisgarh has also been approved by the Bar Council of India (BCI) and offers AICTE-approved courses to students. Further, the university has decent connections with renowned companies such as Tech Mahindra, Aditya Birla, Deloitte, Colgate, DE Shaw, L&T, ITC Limited, etc.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is good but I'm concerned of the packages.

content.Placements: 30% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 4 lpa and the average package was 1.5 - 3 lpa. TATA is the top recruiting company. 50% of students got internships in companies like Tata, Jio, and Havell's.
content.Infrastructure: In college, free Wi-Fi is available, and while in my hostel, they are not installing Wi-Fi on the first floor. While the facilities of the lab, classroom, and library are good. In my hostel, the quality of food is good, but they mostly use gravy, which is tasteless, and they use it to give south Indian food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm not fully satisfied with college, but its good.

content.Placements: Only 10% to 20% of students get placed in my course. The highest package we can get is 2 to 3 LPA. And no top companies came for recruiting; just some random local companies showed up. In my batch, no one got the internships, but my juniors got at least more than 50% of the internships, of course, at local companies. Random roles are offered sometimes, which is good but not guaranteed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and mess is good, but the food is not good at all; it got worse with time. Plus, charges are high for mess. Library and labs are also good for the students practical knowledge, but library books are all outdated and not used, and those that are used are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: Above 75% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA. The average salary package offered is 11 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Deloitte, etc. Students who get above 75% are eligible for internships. Internships depend on students' interests.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All benches are good. Our college has air conditioners. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. Labs and the library are very helpful. The hostel is very comfortable for students. It provides food according to students' favor. The menu will be changed if students are not satisfied. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. It has an ambulance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the quality of teachers, hostel, and canteen facilities.

content.Placements: In our batch, all the students get placements offers but due to the reason of further studying, almost all students were denied the offer. The college provides internships in various local as well as international companies, but they also give choices to the students for selecting the companies in which they were interested.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen was decent, with a clean environment, and hostel rooms were good as well. The campus is very good, it provides big ground where cricket, football, etc., were played without any problem.
content.Faculty: Almost all the teachers of the ICFAI University Raipur were helpful. They all were very knowledgeable in their respective fields, they provide important notes, and also organised timely classes and tests for the preparation of main exams as well as for the development of the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Students studying in this college can have a bright future.

content.Placements: Students are scoring almost 70-80% in all semesters. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tata, Infosys, IBM, etc. The salary package offered is 10 to 20 LPA. Almost all the students have completed their internships in different companies. Designing microchips are used for software products like computers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, and we can get a good signal from Wi-Fi. Labs are wide and have good equipment. Faculty members in labs are good and also have the necessary equipment. Classrooms are very clean, and the atmosphere in our college, as well as classrooms, is also good. The library is also very good.

admission_overview.title: ICFAI University, Raipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ICFAI University, Raipur admissions are primarily merit-based. The university considers scores in entrance exams such as CLAT, CG Pre-B.Ed Entrance Exam, etc. for admission to specific courses. ICFAI University Raipur offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and diploma courses. The university offers courses in various streams such as Engineering, Business and Management, Law etc. The application process at ICFAI University, Raipur is conducted online. eligibility_selection.title: ICFAI Raipur Eligibility & Selection 2026

To get admission in ICFAI Raipur courses, students must meet the eligibility. The university considers entrance exam scores for BA LLB (Hons), B.Ed, etc. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. paragraphs: ICFAI University, Raipur admission processis open. Students must first fill out the application form to participate in the selection rounds. The step by-step application process:
Application Process 2026
Students can apply through official website of the institute. Pay the application fee of INR 500 towards the cost using Credit/Debit Card (Visa/Master Card/Citibank Card)
Selection Rounds

The university evaluates the application forms of the aspirants. While evaluating applicants for admission, the university gives due weightage to academic distinction, awards in sports/ cultural events, debates, quizzes and other extra-curricular activities. For BA LLB (Hons), B.Ed and PhD, admission is entrance-based. Once selected, applicants are called for a personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation
The admission decision is communicated to candidates after the interview process. All the shortlisted aspirants are required to pay theICFAI University Raipur feetowards confirmation of a seat.
ICFAI University, Raipur Fees 2026

ICFAI University Raipuroffers courses in Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software are available to applicants. The different courses offered at ICFAI University Raipur have different course fees. Candidates must pay theICFAI University Raipur feefor the course they have chosen given that they are accepted through the ICFAI University Raipur admission process. faqs.question: Can I join ICFAI University Raipur directly?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University offers admission to most of the UG and PG courses based on merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application forms of the candidates for selection. Besides, admission to some of the courses is entrance-based. The university informs the selected candidates about the interview schedule. Shortlisted aspirants need to further pass the interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at ICFAI University Raipur?
faqs.answer: ICFAI University Raipur admissions are merit-based for most of the courses. Aspirants are selected based on their score and qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round. Besides, the selection to BA LLB (Hons) programme is based on CLAT or LSAT score. For B.Ed, admission is based on CG pre-B.Ed entrance exam conducted by Chattisgarh. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for final selection.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission to ICFAI University, Raipur?

The selection for B.Ed course is based on Pre-B.Ed entrance exam. For all other programmes of ICFAI University, Raipur, admissions are based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam and performance in the personal interview round.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of ICFAI University, Raipur?

placement_data.title: ICFAI University Raipur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the latest data available on the official website, the highest and average package offered to BTech / MCA students during ICFAI University Raipur placements 2025 was INR 10.5 LPA and 4.8 LPA . MBA students received highest and average package of 9 LPA and 4.3 LPA in 2025. For UG programs including BBA , BCom and BCA , overall highest and average package recorded was 6.5 LPA and 2.6 LPA.
Earlier, in 2024 , as per the annual report 2025, overall highest and average package recorded was INR 9 LPA and 3 LPA .

hostel.description: On-campus hostels for boys and girls with Solar-powered electricity, 24/7 security, and high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: College is good but I'm concerned of the packages.
reviews.review_text:
In college, free Wi-Fi is available, and while in my hostel, they are not installing Wi-Fi on the first floor.
While the facilities of the lab, classroom, and library are good.
In my hostel, the quality of food is good, but they mostly use gravy, which is tasteless, and they use it to give south Indian food.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not fully satisfied with college, but its good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and mess is good, but the food is not good at all; it got worse with time. Plus, charges are high for mess. Library and labs are also good for the students practical knowledge, but library books are all outdated and not used, and those that are used are not available.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All benches are good. Our college has air conditioners. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. Labs and the library are very helpful. The hostel is very comfortable for students. It provides food according to students' favor. The menu will be changed if students are not satisfied. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. It has an ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the quality of teachers, hostel, and canteen facilities.
reviews.review_text: The canteen was decent, with a clean environment, and hostel rooms were good as well. The campus is very good, it provides big ground where cricket, football, etc., were played without any problem.

reviews.review_heading: Students studying in this college can have a bright future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, and we can get a good signal from Wi-Fi. Labs are wide and have good equipment. Faculty members in labs are good and also have the necessary equipment. Classrooms are very clean, and the atmosphere in our college, as well as classrooms, is also good. The library is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for study.
reviews.review_text: There is only one main building where all types of courses are conducted. For B.Tech, there is a lab available but no proper staff. The hostel is under construction which may be completed in more than 2 years (for both boys and girls). Overall, the campus is under development. There are no bus facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite satisfying and qualifying as it is the best university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The quality and the independence of the college is good enough to tell the college is the best among all the best colleges. The Wi-Fi facility is available for all the students is good. The sports ground is bad in all-cause, and the games are conducted at the regular intervals.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the teaching of the faculty as they are highly qualified and teach properly.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities which are given to us are Wi-Fi enabled campus, a library which is in a large area, medical facilities, football court, gym, and canteen. The food available in the canteen is worth its price (tasty). The hostel facility is not so good. The ground is also not a proper one. The infrastructure is fine but lacks many things.
There is no proper auditorium.

college_info.college_name: ICFAI University Raipur

data.description: The ICFAI University, Raipur, is a leading multi-disciplinary university famous for its commitment to inclusive and technological advancement. The ICFAI University, Raipur faculty is well-educated with decades worth of expertise in both academia and industry. The university boasts a diverse faculty pool with members having an average experience of 15 to 20 years , including experts from premier national institutions. The team is led by Vice Chancellor Prof. (Dr.) Shiv Dayal Pandey, who is a recipient of the Gyaan Dhara Award 2025 by the CM of Chhattisgarh.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure but dissatisfied with transport management.

review_content.Placements: Our university invites medium scale companies mainly from Chandigarh, Mohali, Panchkula and Hoshiarpur. The companies like Idea Foundation, CS Infotech, Itronix Solution and Web Astral, etc., visited the campus from the IT domain. Around 9-10 students were placed from our batch. The salary package offered was about 2 LPA. The post for which students were hired were a programmer, software engineer, and HR etc. The stipend offered to students was about Rs. 5,000-6,000. The college also has a placement cell.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure but dissatisfied with transport management.

content.Placements: Our university invites medium scale companies mainly from Chandigarh, Mohali, Panchkula and Hoshiarpur. The placement drives are organised to hire students from the departments like computer science, mechanical and management. The companies like Idea Foundation, CS Infotech, Itronix Solution and Web Astral, etc., visited the campus from the IT domain. Around 9-10 students were placed from our batch. The salary package offered was about 2 LPA. The post for which students were hired were a programmer, software engineer, and HR etc. The stipend offered to students was about Rs. 5,000-6,000. The college also has a placement cell.

admission_overview.title: Indus International University (IIU) Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Indus International University (IIU) admissions are both merit-based and entrance-based. The institution accepts JEE Main, MAT, and CMAT, etc. for admission to various courses. Indus International University (IIU) offers courses at UG, PG, Advanced Master's, and Certificate levels. Additionally, courses here are available in multiple streams, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Animation, Beauty and Fitness, Nursing, etc. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the institution for Indus International University (IIU) admissions.

paragraphs: Indus International University (IIU) admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Indus International University (IIU) considers scores in JEE Main, MAT, and CMAT for admission to specific courses.Indus International University (IIU)offers courses at the UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years - 3 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 60,000 - 4,40,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 60,000 - 3,30,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If students want good placements from the college, then they can join it.

content.Placements: Average companies visit the college to hire students. The average package offered is very low as it ranges from 2-3 LPA. The highest package is 5 LPA. 60 or 70% of students get placed, but companies are of very low standards with a package that ranges from 2-3 LPA. We need to prepare on our own too for interviews.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Labs are there, but few machines are in working condition. The canteen is average. The hostel is good but only a few students are living there like 5 or 10. The quality of the food is good. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: College has good faculty for BCA.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities for BCA students at this college are decent, with around 25-35 percent of students getting placed. The average package offered is between 3-5 LPA. Top roles offered are in dotnet, python and php development. In addition, 40-50 percent of students get internships in the BCA course. Overall, this college provides students with decent opportunities for placement and internships.
content.Infrastructure: The BCA course at this college has good facilities, including a well-maintained infrastructure, Wi-Fi-enabled labs, a library, sports facilities, and other amenities. Hostel facilities are also available near the college campus.

reviews.review_text: The BCA course at this college has good facilities, including a well-maintained infrastructure, Wi-Fi-enabled labs, a library, sports facilities, and other amenities. Hostel facilities are also available near the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: College has good faculty and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for MCA at this college are good. The college has a big campus with all necessary facilities. Multiple sports facilities are available for the students. A library with WiFi facility is available in the college campus for the students. Also, hostel facilities were available for the interested students. The food served in the hostel  mess and college canteen was average to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi Group Of Institution Saharanpur, ( The Honest Review).
reviews.review_text: Our department has great facilities for students. There is a computer lab with modern systems and updated software for practical learning. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi for easy access to online resources. The library offers many books and digital materials to help with studies. The labs provide hands-on experience, and all these resources ensure a good learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is the best for students who are interested in BCA course.
reviews.review_text: The college has a Wi-Fi router and labs are available for coding. In tech field, computers are necessary so our course provides a lab with computers and a specific teacher to teach us coding. Our course provides a library also.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are very good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are very good. The quality of facilities in our hostel and the food are good. The mess is decent. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good, and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are excellent in our college. The Wi-Fi is enabled. Laboratories, classrooms, and the library are very good. The quality of the hostel is good, and the rooms in the hostel are very good and security is also very good. The canteen food is good and medical facilities are good. I love sports and games in this college.

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience was good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is simply good. All the facilities like library, labs, classrooms etc. Is comfortable. Hostel is also available in our college. Our faculty and there behavior is good and easy to comfortable to talk with them. So simply it's good experience.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college in our region.
reviews.review_text:
The campus is of 21 acres, and it is one of the largest campuses in our city. There are four blocks on the campus (B.Tech, Polytechnic, management, and BCA). All the standard facilities are available like
Wi-Fi in every classroom, sports ground, basketball ground, badminton court, huge free parking and canteen (common for all) are available. There are separate labs for each block and all courses. There is a separate library for each block. Coaching is available for games on every day. There is n...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of extracurricular courses, good placement drives, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully Wi-Fi. We have total 15+ computer labs and 1200+ computers on our campus. Our college classrooms are neat and tidy. our The college library has a good collection of books which include newspapers and magazines. Our college has good medical facilities which include an ambulance, doctors and medicines. Our campus hostel is neat and clean. There are total 15 plus cleaning staff members for hostels. Our college mess is fully AC and good quality of food is served. On sunday, spec...

reviews.review_heading: Very much thankful and highly satisfied with whatever they offered me.
reviews.review_text: It has high end infrastructure which is situated in the green suburbs of Dehradun. It has a fresh and study friendly ambience. In my knowledge and experience the college is equipped with latest technologies for technical students like engineering and programming or computer applications. Management students attend seminars with known personalities on a frequent basis. In a nutshell you can say that it's a complete package of learning, grooming and fun.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission to this college to study engineering courses.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided on campus are good. Library and playground are always open and provided for free. Everything is the best in our college. Our college is fully clean with a friendly environment. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned and have fans and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best in all ways .
reviews.review_text: wifis are available in all areas in the campus and labs and classrooms and well cleaned and washroom are also clean in our college there labs are so well maintaned and the teachers are very experienced and cheerfull . They help us to achieve our goals .

college_info.college_name: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy:

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Founded in 2001, Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy is a private institute. It is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 17 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy fees ranges between INR 87,000 to 2,03,900. The student intake for these courses is 741. Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of students got placed in our course with good salary packages as per their talent. Many of them settled in top companies. Few students got internships from many top companies through which they gained experience and got opportunities after internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had two blocks, A and B. There were good grounds for sports and good labs. The canteen was good for students to spend their time. Most students stay in private hostels than college hostels for their comfort.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college, and it has good infrastructure and faculty.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students got placed. The companies that came here are Amazon, Wipro, Cognizant etc. The highest package offered was 4 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 1.9 LPA. The top role offered was the administrator. 20% of students got internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has well-built labs with all the equipment. The classrooms are well-furnished. There are cameras in each classroom. We have a large canteen which serves all types of Chinese food and also breakfast items.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Very much dissatisfied because of the college infrastructure, facilities and placements.

review_content.Placements: This college does not give any placements at all. The college placement cell is not at the working stages. Less faculty so no placement workers. Students have to try for placements outside the campus. The campus has not been working on the placements in the last 2 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms. But the library is not present in the college and no play area or ground in the college and no canteen. The college has fewer labs and labs are with insufficient equipment. No college hostel present. No sports or any tournaments.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good faculty members and labs.

review_content.Placements: Almost 65% of the students got placed. The salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 3.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 3 LPA. Abstract and Deccan Construction companies recruit a high number of students when compared to other companies. Overall, 40% of the students got internships in Arawinz Soft Solutions Private Ltd.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our course, labs were perfect & the classrooms were very spacious. The library was huge and had everything required. Wi-Fi was also provided. The canteen served good breakfast & a sick room was also provided. We had a separate sports period every two days, and we enjoyed it a lot.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: There is no lab equipment, and the classes are irregular neither placements are provided by college.

review_content.Placements: In our course, the highest percentage is 75%. For our course, neither jobs nor any salary packages were offered. We did an internship in Aparna Construction Site, and the company gave no other offer. Students who clear all subjects got internships in NIT Warangal, Bhuvaneshwar etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: No proper infrastructure was available in our college. The only library was available. Food served was too bad in our hostel, but the room and other facilities were good. Sports were there, but only cricket was played at our college. No proper medical facilities were provided. There was a good canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the placements and infrastructure provided by the college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are less, and not more than 50% of the students get placed. The minimum salary package offered was 1.2 LPA, and the maximum salary package offered was 3 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Flipkart, and Capgemini visit our college and offer BPO jobs for students. A top role offered by other companies is a site engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility was good. Labs are good. Our college provides workshop, C lab, ELCS lab and good geotechnical engineering lab. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a good playground for games like volleyball, football and cricket.
