review_summary.college_name: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students got placed in our course with good salary packages as per their talent. Many of them settled in top companies. Few students got internships from many top companies through which they gained experience and got opportunities after internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had two blocks, A and B. There were good grounds for sports and good labs. The canteen was good for students to spend their time. Most students stay in private hostels than college hostels for their comfort.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college, and it has good infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: 10% of students got placed. The companies that came here are Amazon, Wipro, Cognizant etc. The highest package offered was 4 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 1.9 LPA. The top role offered was the administrator. 20% of students got internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-built labs with all the equipment. The classrooms are well-furnished. There are cameras in each classroom. We have a large canteen which serves all types of Chinese food and also breakfast items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Very much dissatisfied because of the college infrastructure, facilities and placements.

content.Placements: This college does not give any placements at all. The college placement cell is not at the working stages. Less faculty so no placement workers. Students have to try for placements outside the campus. The campus has not been working on the placements in the last 2 years.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms. But the library is not present in the college and no play area or ground in the college and no canteen. The college has fewer labs and labs are with insufficient equipment. No college hostel present. No sports or any tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and labs.

content.Placements: Almost 65% of the students got placed. The salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 3.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 3 LPA. Abstract and Deccan Construction companies recruit a high number of students when compared to other companies. Overall, 40% of the students got internships in Arawinz Soft Solutions Private Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: In our course, labs were perfect & the classrooms were very spacious. The library was huge and had everything required. Wi-Fi was also provided. The canteen served good breakfast & a sick room was also provided. We had a separate sports period every two days, and we enjoyed it a lot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: There is no lab equipment, and the classes are irregular neither placements are provided by college.

content.Placements: In our course, the highest percentage is 75%. For our course, neither jobs nor any salary packages were offered. We did an internship in Aparna Construction Site, and the company gave no other offer. Students who clear all subjects got internships in NIT Warangal, Bhuvaneshwar etc.
content.Infrastructure: No proper infrastructure was available in our college. The only library was available. Food served was too bad in our hostel, but the room and other facilities were good. Sports were there, but only cricket was played at our college. No proper medical facilities were provided. There was a good canteen.

paragraphs: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.

Some of the popular Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy programmes are B.E. / B.Tech, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy admissions:

courses_data.name: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the UG level,Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academyoffers B.E. / B.Tech in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 3 - 4 years. The curriculum is divided into 6 - 8 semesters. Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy B.E. / B.Tech admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Information Technology. Some other key highlights for Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy B.E. / B.Tech admissions are given below: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy B.E. / B.Tech fees isINR 2,00,000 - 2,03,900and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. description: Aurora's Scientific Technological and Research Academy TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 61323 and 106989 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top two most competitive branches were B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 61323 and 106989, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

hostel.description: The Institute has a tie-up with the hostel where the student feels at home by providing a friendly, comfortable, well furnished and secure ambiance. Transport service is also available from hostel to Institute.

library.description: The library has 6,424 titles and 44,935 volumes, and 102 Periodicals. It has a facility for accommodating 500 students at a time with 20 systems, also a member of the DELNET. reviews.review_heading: There is no lab equipment, and the classes are irregular neither placements are provided by college.

Sports were there, but only cricket was played at our college. No proper medical facilities were provided. There was a good canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the placements and infrastructure provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility was good. Labs are good. Our college provides workshop, C lab, ELCS lab and good geotechnical engineering lab. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides a good playground for games like volleyball, football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has bad infrastructure, but they are providing good placements for the outgoing batch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not that impressive. We have a very normal building whereas the labs and all other things are pretty good and comfortable for our course. The library is one of the vast libraries compare to our other branches. Classrooms are also good enough for a good strength to fit in. The food served in the canteen is a bit hygienic and can be modified in the case of ambience. Medical facilities are good. The college doesn't show much interest in organising sports and gam...

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for sports. It has an NCC and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is spacious and serves good food for the students. Classrooms are very spacious and clean. The college provides a separate block for our department with labs. Workshops are maintained clean. There are separate grounds for cricket, basketball and volleyball. The college provides buses for transport from various parts of the city. The college provides a library with vast books of every department. The college provides a uniform which brings students to look dignified.

reviews.review_heading: Aurora college, temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of my college is very good and infrastructure is very much developed, hostel is available at normal cost and normal bed rooms and food quality is good, very big ground and facilities, good canteen and good wardens along with the timings, hostel provide bus facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms and library. Chandrayanagutta campus is under construction, and the college is shifted to Moosrambagh. The college doesn't provide hostel facility for students.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with faculty.Having a good placement record makes the college sustain in heights.
reviews.review_text:
1. The course Labs were spacious having 100 desktops with high-speed LAN Connection. Every classroom has a projector and CCTV cameras. The campus is having its own network infrastructure surrounded around 6 acres. The library is comprised of 56,000 volumes of curriculum books. 
2. The college has its hostel accommodation in Moosarambagh and there is a transport facility for the hostelers. Food quality is not bad. Canteen is clean and tidy always since it is maintained by others. College has a 2 ...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied, and they provided most of the placements which belong to BPO.
reviews.review_text: They provided good infrastructure like labs, classrooms, the library, but they didn't provide sufficient computers, and some are not working correctly, and they not even updated books for reading purpose. They encourage every student for participating in sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college and education system are not suitable for a student who is willing to be excellent.
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities like a huge ground for cricket. There are basketball, volleyball, kabaddi court. Labs are available for every stream, but some of the equipment and devices won't work. For CSE, there is no Wi-Fi facility, and the systems in the lab won't have the updated OS.

reviews.review_heading: Aurora is a college which provides all skills to a student, when he leaves the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well built and it has got all the facilities like laboratory, medical facilities and also ncc programme, the college does't provide Wi-Fi the classrooms are always maintained, the canteen does't have any options but the food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It's good college to get stuffed with practical and technical knowledge. Go for it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has divided into blocks. Separate block for different branches. I feel happy with our college infrastructure. It has vast area for parking vehicle's. But sometimes it is not sufficient in the time of doing some events, Because many people will be visiting from our college and various other colleges too.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RVS Group of Institution, Dindigul Campus offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Arch. On the other hand, at the PG level, the RVS Group of Institution, Dindigul Campus offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for RVS Group of Institution, Dindigul Campus courses range between INR 1,00,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Combined intake across all courses at RVS Group of Institution, Dindigul Campus is up to 690. RVS Group of Institution, Dindigul Campus offers B.Pharma, B.Arch, After 10th Diploma courses for students to build their careers in Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Engineering. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.

The programme offered at AIHM includes four levels of Internship/Immersion-

Students also get assistance and help to prepare for the interview and perform well with the guidance of the faculty members. Following are some of the major recruiters at the institute:

admission_overview.title: Ahmedabad Institute of Hospitality Management Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Ahmedabad Institute of Hospitality Management admissions 2025 is entrance-based. Candidates have to appear for any of these entrance exams- CAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAT, GMAT or they can also appear for the AIHM Entrance Exam which is conducted by the institute itself. A personal interview round is also conducted for all the courses. Ahmedabad Institute of Hospitality Management offers three courses to candidates. These include MBA/PGDM in Financial Management, Hospitality Management and Sales and Marketing Management. All these courses are offered in full-time mode. Candidates must pass bachelors in any stream and obtained at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying examination for taking admission.

faqs.answer:
A:    Jai Shriram Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I rate this college 5 out of 10.

review_content.Placements: The college is not good. There are no placements in the college. The fees of college is not so high. There is no placement cell in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is normal. There are not activities like playing and singing in the college. A/C is not used in the classrooms. The condition of classrooms is bad. Bus service is provided to the students. The labs are not good.
review_content.Faculty: Few faculty members are well-qualified, but some are learners. Teachers are not very helpful because they don't provide extra activities. They don't impart proper and practical knowledge to the students. The college is only meant for a degree and not for knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very bad for B.Tech students. Think before you take the admission.

review_content.Placements: The placements of our college are very poor. They invite job consultancies for placements, and they demand money for training. Sometimes, they invite training institutes, and they charge thousands of money. After all, they complete the course in 5 days and leave the students after taking the money. They invite BPO companies for the students of technical departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it is not much great. Despite using modern infrastructure, the benches and classrooms present in the college are similar to that of schools. The laboratories and workshops are good. All the departments are separated, and there are different blocks for all the departments such as technical, pharmacy, JBT, management, etc. The entire campus is fully greenish and clean. But the water cooler is not in good condition, and some equipment is not in working condition.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing Execut

overview_faqs.question: Is Advanced Educational Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Advanced Educational Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Tech, BBA, D.Ed, BCA, B.Ed, M.Ed, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Teaching & Education, IT & Software, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Advanced Educational Institutions has a review rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.2 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Advanced Educational Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, bad placement, bad infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 10 percent of the students were placed in local companies. The highest package is 5 LPA, the average is 2 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Top companies are not coming to college. The college and any company have not offered any internships at this college. The top roles offered are software engineer and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of this college are average; no special facilities are provided by the college. Hostels are available at this college, AC or non-AC. The quality of food is not good and other facilities are below average. The mess is very bad. The canteen is not available at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of poor placement and teaching qualities.

content.Placements: 1. approximately Only 5% of students would be placed in CSE. 2. The highest salary 12k per month, the lowest salary 8k was offered. 3. No any MNC Companies was coming. 4. Students were hired for Technical support. All students got internship through private institutions that is college not offered best internship in companies.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Infrastructure is good and facilities also available like Wi-Fi, Labs also library was good. 2. Quality of hostel room is good and clean, food is also good in mess and canteen but menu was not updated timely. 3. Sports kit was available always but no any coach for guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I rate this college 5 out of 10.

content.Placements: The college is not good. There are no placements in the college. The fees of college is not so high. There is no placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is normal. There are not activities like playing and singing in the college. A/C is not used in the classrooms. The condition of classrooms is bad. Bus service is provided to the students. The labs are not good.
content.Faculty: Few faculty members are well-qualified, but some are learners. Teachers are not very helpful because they don't provide extra activities. They don't impart proper and practical knowledge to the students. The college is only meant for a degree and not for knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is very bad for B.Tech students. Think before you take the admission.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are very poor. They invite job consultancies for placements, and they demand money for training. Sometimes, they invite training institutes, and they charge thousands of money. After all, they complete the course in 5 days and leave the students after taking the money. They invite BPO companies for the students of technical departments.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it is not much great. Despite using modern infrastructure, the benches and classrooms present in the college are similar to that of schools. The laboratories and workshops are good. All the departments are separated, and there are different blocks for all the departments such as technical, pharmacy, JBT, management, etc. The entire campus is fully greenish and clean. But the water cooler is not in good condition, and some equipment is not in working condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college faculty is good and all facilities are available which is required for the student.

content.Placements: If the student has skills for sure, the placement is 100 percent. In our senior batch, ten students got generally selected Maruti, and other companies are visited for the recruitment in our college. The average salary offered is approx 30 thousand per month and the highest package offered was is 4 lac pa.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi 24*7. Classroom are good. If any student gets injured, first aid will be provided by the college. In labs, almost all machine are available which are required in our course. The college provides two hostels one for girls and one for boys. around 50- 100 rooms are available.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons.) in Financial Market - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 75% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA and the average salary package offered is 15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 8 LPA. Almost 72% of students get internships. Top roles offered are market executive, market researcher, sales executive, and human resource.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Many books are available in the library. The quality of the food is good. A variety of food is available in the canteen. Sports facilities are available.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. Food is awesome in the canteen. The hostel rooms are also good. I haven't faced any infrastructure related issues till now. But, they should renovate the classrooms because classes are not much attractive. Wi-Fi facility is very good. Elan fest is conducted every year.

admission_process.title: School of Management Sciences Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University admission process 2026is a multi-step process. Candidates have to fill-out the application form, appear in counselling round and get their seats confirmed. UG applicants have to fill the application form online. Applicants for PG courses have to appear for entrance test and fill the online application form of college.
Candidates can check below the School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University admission process 2026:
Online Application

Candidates who are applying to UG, PG and doctoral courses at School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University have to fill-out online application form on the website of college. To apply for admission, applicants should check eligibility and selection criteria for the course.
School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University Selection Round

Candidates have to check the selection criteria and appear for counselling for taking admission in UG courses. PG Students are asseseed based on score in entrance test, group discussion and personal interview round.The college releases the merit list based on their performance in exam and interview.
Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates after completion of the verification process have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

BBA (Hons) Financial Markets is offered in collaboration with the NSE. After the completion of BBA (Hons) Financial Markets, students will get eight certifications from NSE and two certifications from SEBI along with the degree. BBA (Hons) Human Resource focuses on industrial laws, compensation management, negotiation, stress management, training, performance management and more, whereas BBA (Hons) Marketing deals with various aspects of Marketing. The selection of students for all the specialisations is based on the marks secured in HSC. Below mentioned is the eligibility criteria for the same: BBA (Hons) Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Selection Criteria Financial Markets Class 12 from CBSE or equivalent board with an aggregate of 60% Human Resources Marketing

faqs.question: What are the BBA fees at Apeejay School of Management?
faqs.answer: The BBA fees for School of Management Sciences at Apeejay Stya University consists of one-time admission fees as well as annual fees which are:Admission Fee of INR 2.6 LakhsAnnual Fees of INR 1.2 LakhsSome students may also be able to get an early-bird discount of INR 1.4 Lakhs during admissions.

faqs.question: What are the other fee components included in the SoMS, Apeejay Stya University BBA (H) fee structure?
faqs.answer: School of Management Sciences, ASU BBA (H) course fee includes eight other fee components. It includes application fee, online library fee, alumni fund, caution money, etc. These are charged annually, per semester, and one time. Mentioned below are some of the other fee components along with the fee amount:Application Fee: INR 1,000Online Library Fee: INR 2,000Alumni Fee: INR 3,000Insurance: INR 500Development Fee: INR 10,000, etc.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BBA (H) at School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University with 45% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for a SoMS, ASU BBA (H) course need to beClass 12 or equivalent passwith at least50% aggregate. Hence, you are not eligible for admission. This minimum aggregate is as per the official website. It is important that the candidates hold the important certificates as well for verification purposes.

faqs.question: How to calculate RoI for School of Management Sciences, ASU BBA (H) courses?
faqs.answer: SoMS, Apeeja Stya University BBA (H) course return on investment can be calculated by evaluating fee and placements package. The total fee is approimatelyINR 5.03 lakh. It is inclusive of various components. This fee amount is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. But is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

courses_data.name: School of Management Sciences MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: At the PG level, the School offers a full-time two-year MBA programme with dual specialisation. The programme is offered in nine different specialisations. The teaching pedagogy of MBA comprises simulation, case study, role play and expert lectures to enhance the skills of students. MBA students get international exposure by spending a few weeks in France at Normandy Business School, Paris or in the United States at the University of Toledo. Admission to MBA is entrance-based, and candidates are selected based on the scores obtained in the entrance exam and their performance in GDPI. Name of all the specialisations along with the eligibility criteria are given below: MBA Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Human Resources Qualifying exams:CAT/XAT/MAT/CMAT/NMAT/SNAP/ AUCET Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university with an aggregate of 60% or its equivalent CGPA Marketing Finance Operations Management Information Technology International Business Retail Management Entrepreneurship Healthcare Management

faqs.question: How much is the Apeejay School of Management Sciences MBA application fees?
faqs.answer: The application fee isINR 1,000for Apeejay School of Management Sciences MBA course. It is a onetime charge and has to be paid for form submission. The mentioned amount is as per the official website. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: In how many specialisations does School of Management Studies, Apeejay Stya University offer MBA?
faqs.answer: School of Management Studies, Apeejay Stya University offers MBA in the given specialisations:Human ResourcesMarketingOperations ManagementFinanceInformation TechnologyInternational BusinessRetail ManagementEntrepreneurshipHealthcare Mangement

faqs.question: Which documents are required for a seat in School of Management Sciences, ASU MBA course?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to submit educational and identity proofs for verification purposes. The admission gets confirmed in MBA at SoMS, Apeejay Stya University after document verification. Some of the important ones are listed below:Class 10 and 12 marksheetGraduation degree and certificateAadhaar card or other identity proofPassport-size photographEntrance exam scorecard, etc.

faqs.question: What is required to pursue MBA from Apeejay School of Management?
faqs.answer: To study MBA from School of Management Sciences at Apeejay Stya University students must meet the required eligibility:Having a UG degree with degree scores of at least 50% totalValid score of at least 50% in national or state-level entrance exams such as CAT / MAT / XAT / GMAT / CMAT / ATMA.Though the selection process depends will depend on other factors and not competitive exam scores.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Apeejay School of Management?
faqs.answer: The course-wise admission process after completion of eligibility for School of Management Sciences at Apeejay Stya University is given here:UG courses: Group Discussion, Personal Interview Rounds and ASU-CATPG courses: Group Discussion and Personal Interview Rounds (55% in ASU-CAT)PhD programme: Written test and research proposal presentation

faqs.question: What are the steps of admission process at School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University?
faqs.answer: Candidates can check below the steps of admission process at School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University:Online ApplicationCandidates who are applying to UG, PG and doctoral courses at School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University have to fill-out online application form.School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University Selection RoundCandidates have to check the selection criteria and appear for counselling for taking admission in UG courses. PG Students are asseseed based on score in entrance test, group discussion and personal interview round.Admission ConfirmationShortlisted candidates after completion of the verification process have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the mode of application at Apeejay School of Management?
faqs.answer: The mode of application for School of Management Sciences at Apeejay Stya University admissions is both online and offline for most courses.Online: Students must apply through the university page after they complete the eligibility requirements.Offline: Students can apply offline by downloading the form, taking a printout and filling the form. Send the form to the university's address. Pay the application fee of INR 1000 either online or offline via a Demand Draft.

faqs.question: Are there any reserved seats for MBA in School of Management Sciences, ASU?
faqs.answer: SoMS, Apeejay Stya University may not offer direct admission to MBA or have reserved seats. This is as per information taken from multiple sources. The seat intake is 20 for the PG level course. It is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. This is subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Many books are available in the library. The quality of the food is good. A variety of food is available in the canteen. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is not good for the management students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good. Food is awesome in the canteen. The hostel rooms are also good. I haven't faced any infrastructure related issues till now. But, they should renovate the classrooms because classes are not much attractive. Wi-Fi facility is very good. Elan fest is conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college environment and its good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were provided to students like Wi-Fi, playground for cricket, court for tennis and table tennis, ground for volleyball, library, and security for hostel, and first aid facilities in every room, and medical facilities, and RO water for drinking were available in this college.

Both these forms can be filled online on the University's website, or obtained from the University, or Admissions Offices.
Candidates can check below the eligibility to apply for School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University scholarships:

Candidates can calculate the SoMS, Apeejay Stya University MBA return on investment by comparing its fee and placements package. This comparison helps in understanding the time period in which the course fee can be recovered. The total fees is INR 7.2 lakh. Many top companies have partnered with the university for placements, such as Airtel, Aircel, Accenture, etc.

Students applying for Masters and Doctoral programmes School of Management Sciences, Apeejay Stya University are eligible for a number of research grants and teaching fellowships. It can be anything fromteaching courses to acting as faculty and research assistants in on-going projects and academic programmes.
